concerns.text: SC-006 references 'See Assumptions' for a sensitivity analysis on verbosity level (±10%), but no User Story explicitly defines the scope or execution of this sensitivity analysis. While FR-006/FR-007 cover the main regression/ANOVA, SC-006 describes a distinct validation step (varying verbosity by ±10%) that lacks a direct anchor to a specific User Story (e.g., US-2) or a dedicated story. This risks being an unbacked goal or scope creep if not explicitly anchored to US-2's analysis scope.
